---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused diagnostic or usability improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What diagnostic problem is difficult to solve today?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the check, report field, or CLI behavior you propose.

## Safety and Weight

Explain how the proposal remains lightweight, read-only by default, and usable
without a GPU or local inference runtime.

## Alternatives

Describe any existing commands or tools you considered.

## Additional Context

Include sanitized examples where useful. Do not include secrets or private
infrastructure details.
